hero.headline: *Fast Response* Plumbing Solutions for Atlanta Homes & Businesses
hero.subheadline: Emergency repairs, drain cleaning, water heater installation & more. Licensed plumbers with 15+ years serving Atlanta neighborhoods.

services_section.label: OUR SERVICES
services_section.heading: Complete Plumbing Solutions
services_section.subheading: From emergency repairs to full installations, we handle every plumbing challenge

services.title: Emergency Plumbing Repairs
services.description: Burst pipes, severe leaks, clogged drains, and urgent plumbing failures. Available 24/7 with rapid response times throughout Atlanta metro area.

services.title: Water Heater Services
services.description: Installation, repair, and replacement of traditional and tankless water heaters. Energy-efficient solutions with manufacturer warranties included.

services.title: Drain Cleaning & Sewer Lines
services.description: Professional drain cleaning, sewer line inspection with camera technology, and hydro jetting services to clear stubborn blockages completely.

services.title: Fixture Installation & Repair
services.description: Faucets, toilets, sinks, garbage disposals, and bathroom fixtures. Professional installation with proper connections and leak-free results.

services.title: Pipe Repair & Repiping
services.description: Leak detection, pipe repairs, and complete repiping for older homes. Modern materials including PEX and copper for long-lasting performance.

about.heading: Serving Atlanta with Honest Plumbing Since 2008
about.body: Brawner Plumbing & Services has been Atlanta's trusted plumbing partner for over 15 years. We're a family-owned business committed to transparent pricing, quality workmanship, and treating every customer like family. Our licensed master plumbers handle everything from small repairs to major installations across the Atlanta metro area.

reviews.name: Marcus T.
reviews.text: Had a water heater emergency on Sunday morning. Brawner came out within 2 hours and had us back up with hot water by lunch. Fair pricing and excellent work - highly recommend.

reviews.name: Jennifer K.
reviews.text: Called about a kitchen sink leak that was getting worse. They diagnosed the issue quickly and fixed it the same day. Clean work area when finished - true professionals.

reviews.name: David R.
reviews.text: Needed our main sewer line cleared after multiple failed attempts with other companies. Brawner used camera inspection and hydro jetting - problem solved permanently.

service_areas.label: SERVICE AREAS
service_areas.heading: Plumbing Services Throughout Metro Atlanta
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times to neighborhoods across the Atlanta metro area

cta.heading: Ready to Fix Your Plumbing Problem?
cta.body: Don't let plumbing issues disrupt your day. Get professional service from Atlanta's most trusted plumbers with upfront pricing and guaranteed results.
